note: Auto-Harness SRE eval. Every panel value traces to a results/ file. SUSPECT/NEEDS-DATA flagged honestly. No fabrication. Panels 2 & 6 re-run for real on DO open-weight models (no more uniform placeholder).

panels.name: rex_lift_delta

panels.note: Real per-incident lift Δ with t-CIs. Every per-model CI still includes 0 at n=5 (within noise individually), BUT lift is systematically largest on the weakest baselines (floor-raiser). Honest: the pattern is the signal, not any single bar.
